dashboard.subtitle: Keep the selected month in sync with spending, cash flow, and bank health.

summary.connectedBanksCaption: Accounts feeding your dashboard right now.
summary.currentBalanceCaption: Combined balance across synced bank accounts.
summary.cardsCaption: Cards available for monthly usage tracking.
summary.lastSyncCaption: Most recent bank refresh reflected in the workspace.

cashFlow.subtitle: Understand where the month is heading before expected income and recurring expenses land.
cashFlow.title: Cash Flow Projection
cashFlow.error: Failed to load cash flow data
cashFlow.currentBalanceCaption: Live balance from your main bank account.
cashFlow.projectedBalanceCaption: Estimated balance at month-end after pending recurring income and expenses.
cashFlow.noEvents: No expected recurring items this month

summary.riskCaption: A quick reading of projected month-end pressure.
summary.expectedEventsCaption: Still-open recurring inflows and outflows this month.
summary.projectedNetCaption: Expected net movement after scheduled events land.
summary.daysRemainingCaption: Time left for the current month to change course.
summary.outlookCopy: Use this page to separate what has already happened from what is still expected, then decide whether the remaining month needs intervention.

profile.subtitle: A quick read on identity, connected accounts, and the core settings shaping the workspace.
profile.title: Account Information

summary.connectedBanksCaption: Accounts currently attached to your workspace.
summary.totalBalanceCaption: Combined balance across all synced institutions.
summary.languageCaption: The active language used across the app.

transactions.subtitle: Scan the current slice of activity, tighten filters, and edit the records that drive your monthly totals.

summary.scopeCaption: The active month or explicit date range applied to the ledger.
summary.statusCaption: Whether you are focused on completed or pending movement.
summary.typeCaption: Switches between account and credit-card transaction behavior.
summary.cashLensCaption: Quick orientation for the filter stack before you scan rows.

form.descriptionMin: Description must be at least 10 characters

categories.subtitle: Review where money is grouped, which categories are doing most of the work, and where manual cleanup or new rules may help.

summary.trackedCaption: Visible categories after the current filter.
summary.capturedCaption: Absolute spend mapped to the visible categories.
summary.averageCaption: Average spend pressure per visible category.

loansSavings.subtitle: Track how much capital is parked in savings and how much is still committed to debt repayment.
loansSavings.title: Loans & Savings

summary.totalSavingsCaption: Deposits and savings balances reported by connected banks.
summary.totalLoanBalanceCaption: Outstanding debt still sitting on active loans.
summary.nextMonthPaymentsCaption: Expected loan payments coming up next.
summary.loanAccountsCaption: Individual loan schedules currently being tracked.

savings.title: Savings
savings.subtitle: Longer-term cash reserves and deposit balances grouped by institution.

loans.title: Loans
loans.subtitle: Outstanding credit obligations, repayment pace, and next payment obligations.

recurring.subtitle: Review recurring spending and income candidates before they drift into the background.

summary.monthlyTotalCaption: Recurring outgoing groups currently tagged as monthly.
summary.monthlyIncomeCaption: Recurring incoming groups currently tagged as monthly.

panel.title: Detected recurring groups

savingsGoals.subtitle: Keep each target visible, understand the gap, and decide whether the pace still works.

summary.activeGoalsCaption: Goals currently tracked in the workspace.
summary.savedSoFarCaption: Combined balance committed to your goals.
